testcase.name: Validate the Adcation POM Module
testcase.system-out: Given Enter the URL "https://adactinhotelapp.com/"..........................passed When Enter the Username "DevipriyaS"........................................passed And Enter the Password "Priya@1234".........................................passed And Click the login button..................................................passed And Select the value in Location dropdown "New York"........................passed And Select the value in Hotels dropdown "Hotel Sunshine"....................passed And Select the value in RoomType dropdown "Double"..........................passed And Select the value in No.of Rooms dropdown "1"............................passed And Enter the Checkin data "17/03/2026".....................................passed And Enter the Checkout date "19/03/2026"....................................passed And Select the value in Adults per Room dropdown "2"........................passed And Select the value in Childern per Room dropdown "1"......................passed And Click the search button.................................................passed And Click the select button.................................................passed And Click the Continue button...............................................passed And Enter the First Name "Devipriya"........................................passed And Enter the Last Name "Surendhar".........................................passed And Enter the Billing Address "Chennai".....................................passed And Enter the CC Number "1234567890987654"..................................passed And Select the value in CC Type dropdown "VISA".............................passed And Select the Value in Expiry date Month "2"...............................passed And Select the Value in Expiry date Year "2028".............................passed And Enter the CVV Number "1234".............................................passed Then Click the Book Now button..............................................passed
